name: Mexican Turkey Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine turkey, 1 1/2 cups sour cream, 3 teaspoons taco seasoning, the entire can of soup, 1 1/2 cups cheese, onion, salsa and olives.
2. Place about one-third cup of filling on each tortilla.
3. Roll up each tortilla, seam side down, and place them in a greased 9 x 13 baking dish.
4. Mix the remaining sour cream, taco seasoning, and soup together.
5. Pour this mixture over the rolled tortillas.
6. Cover the dish with foil.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
8. Sprinkle with any remaining cheese.
9. Serve with shredded lettuce and chopped tomatoes. Add more salsa if desired.
